steps.title: Support the outlier claim
steps.content: The sentence calls jets reaching the ionosphere outliers because the ionosphere begins about 80 km above Earth. The next clause says most jets reach only 20 to 50 km, which supports the outlier label by showing the usual height is much lower.

steps.title: Use a confirming transition
steps.content: Choice A would make the lower heights a result of the outlier claim. Choice C would add a separate point, and Choice D would create a contrast. The transition should mean "in fact" and introduce evidence supporting the previous statement. The answer is B.
